description: The opening match of the 2026 FIFA World Cup sees co-hosts Mexico take on South Africa at the legendary Estadio Azteca. The atmosphere in Mexico City will be electric as El Tri look to start their campaign with a crucial victory.
The USMNT opens their home World Cup in spectacular fashion at SoFi Stadium against a stubborn Paraguay side. Christian Pulisic and co. will carry the hopes of the nation on their shoulders.
Canada begins their co-hosting duties in Toronto as they welcome Bosnia and Herzegovina. Alphonso Davies will be key as Les Rouges seek a fast start in Group B.
A mouth-watering clash in Group C as five-time champions Brazil face 2022 semi-finalists Morocco. Vinícius Jr. against Achraf Hakimi promises to be an epic battle.
A replay of the 2018 World Cup semi-final, England meets Croatia in a pivotal Group L encounter. Jude Bellingham and Luka Modrić face off in what could determine the group winner.
European champions Spain clash with South American powerhouse Uruguay in Miami. The technical brilliance of Lamine Yamal against the raw power of Darwin Núñez.
